name: submit_score
description: Submits a new golf score. Implements Rolling 5 Rule: only the 5 most recent scores are kept. Validates Stableford points (1-45) and ensures no duplicate scores for the same date.

name: simulate_draw
description: Performs a pre-analysis of the monthly prize pool based on current active subscribers. Calculates splits for 3, 4, and 5-number matches (40/35/25 ratio).

name: calculate_charity_cut
description: Calculates the minimum 10% contribution from the subscription fee for the user's selected charity.
